task_completion.description: Navigate to the Address Book module
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the OpenEMR 'Address Book' popup window, modal, or page loaded (often found under Miscellaneous or Administration menus).

task_completion.description: Enter correct provider name and title
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'Add New' form with 'Sarah' in the First Name field, 'Mitchell' in the Last Name field, and 'MD' in the Title field.

task_completion.description: Enter correct address, city, state, and zip code
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the address fields populated with '456 Medical Center Drive', 'Springfield', 'MA' (or Massachusetts), and '01103'.

task_completion.description: Enter correct phone, fax, and email
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the contact fields populated with Phone '(413) 555-7890', Fax '(413) 555-7891', and Email 's.mitchell@springfieldgi.example.com'.
Screenshot shows 'Gastroenterology' in the Specialty field, 'Springfield GI Associates' in the Organization or Notes field, and NPI '1234567893'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new entry is saved and visible in the Address Book
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Address Book list view or search results displaying a row for 'Mitchell, Sarah' (or 'Sarah Mitchell') with the correct details visible.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the OpenEMR web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying the OpenEMR GUI, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Data was entered into form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show text inside input fields or dropdowns being selected, rather than text pasted into a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Result is a genuine system state
integrity.visual_evidence: The final verification shows a standard OpenEMR table row or profile view, not a mocked-up text display or notification created by the agent.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Provider Name: Sarah Mitchell. Expected NPI: 1234567893. Expected Organization: Springfield GI Associates.
